data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for real-time capacity adjustment.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'real-time capacity adjustment', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the need for real-time capacity adjustment, there are no specific endpoints or data that confirm its implementation or validation. Therefore, the requirement remains unfulfilled due to a lack of supporting evidence.
gaps: No evidence of real-time capacity adjustment being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement real-time capacity adjustment validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system can adjust capacity in real-time based on current bookings and no-show predictions.
